---
title: "CS-C: Measuring a small DC quantity at the statistical limit"
---

> **Thread:** Modulation + lock-in (M10) --> estimator design at the Cramer-Rao bound (M3) --> blind analysis (M6) --> systematic budget (M5).

*Content to be written.*

## Subsystem overview

*To be written.*

## Design walkthrough

*To be written.*

## Measured performance vs. budget

*To be written.*
